## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between GrowthX and 7shifts for AI-driven content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [7shifts has a large internal content team (4 people) but no AI content creation; considering team restructure](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [GrowthX typically doesn't offer strategy-only engagements; prefers combined strategy + execution partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Timing and budget constraints are key factors; Justin to reassess in October after potential team changes](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [GrowthX workshops could be a valuable interim step for 7shifts team to learn AI content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

## Topics

### Current 7shifts Content Situation

  - [4-person content team for $50M ARR company](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [No AI content creation currently used](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Underperforming SEO agency to be terminated](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Company recently refreshed ICP documents](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [7shifts transitioning from high-growth to steady, profitable growth](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### GrowthX Service Offering

  - [Typically combines strategy (Phase 1) and execution (Phase 2)](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows to speed up processes](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Offers full-service content creation, including staging, publishing, and LLM monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Could potentially replace SEO agency and LLM monitoring platform](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Collaboration Challenges

  - [Justin initially interested in 8-week strategy sprint to train internal team](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [GrowthX prefers ongoing partnerships with execution component](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Budget constraints: GrowthX more expensive than current SEO agency ($15k/mo vs \~$7.5k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Timing: Current SEO contract runs until March](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Alternative Learning Resources

  - [GrowthX workshops cover artifact generation and AI content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Could be a good starting point for 7shifts team to learn and experiment](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Team Restructuring Considerations

  - [Justin evaluating potential changes to content team](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Decision between keeping current team + GrowthX strategy sprint vs. reducing team size + full GrowthX engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Previous GrowthX Contact

  - [GrowthX met with Libby (leaving 7shifts) in February](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [7shifts CEO aware of GrowthX through Homebase connection](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Justin to assess team changes and budget allocation in October](https://fathom.video/share/RBSka5_yUtNyZr6D6N8QQT6VUXzyk8PR?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
